approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies hedge accounting for recognised assets or liabilities, and a dividend receivable recognised as an asset can fall within the recognised-item hedge family.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies hedge accounting for forecast transactions, which is a separate top-level hedge model relevant to dividend-related foreign currency exposures before recognition.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify a distinct hedge model for foreign currency risk on a net investment in a foreign operation in consolidated financial statements.
